title: Tata Motors is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Tata Motors is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Tata Motors in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tata Motors:
Tata Motors is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Motors!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
